system.effect: The psyker hurls an object or wave of force at a target. This is a Psychic Bolt that deals 1d10 + Psy Rating Impact damage with Pen 2 and the Concussive (1) quality.

description.value: The psyker seizes nearby objects with his mind and hurls them at a target with tremendous force. This is a Psychic Bolt that deals 1d10 + Psy Rating Impact damage with Penetration 2 and the Concussive (1) quality. The psyker can use any suitably sized object in the environment as ammunition.
